description_long: This is a high-performance Ducati racing motorcycle, featuring a streamlined aerodynamic fairing with a predominantly white, red, and black color scheme. The bodywork is adorned with sponsor logos, including prominent 'Ducati' and 'TIM' branding on the side panels. The motorcycle is equipped with slick racing tires, lightweight alloy wheels, and a robust rear swingarm, all designed for optimal speed and handling on the track. The seat is compact and contoured for a single rider, with a raised rear tail section and integrated number plate. The front end features a low-profile windscreen, aggressive headlight cutouts, and clip-on handlebars for a racing posture. The bike is supported by a paddock stand, indicating its use in a racing or maintenance context.
description: A Ducati racing motorcycle with a sleek aerodynamic fairing, racing livery, and sponsor logos, designed for high-speed performance. It features a compact seat, clip-on handlebars, and is supported by a paddock stand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full Ducati livery, aerodynamic fairing, and exposed rear wheel with racing slick tire.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow tail section, single seat, and visible rear tire with the number plate and sponsor logos.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engine casing, exhaust system, and additional sponsor decals.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the low windscreen, aggressive front fairing, and clip-on handlebars.
